name: Chocolate Waffles-Mix
recipeInstructions:
To make sour milk, place 1 tablespoon vinegar in a measuring cup and fill to the 1 cup mark with milk.
Beat eggs with a rotary or electric beater until frothy. Add milk, vanilla, and shortening. Stir to combine. Add Mix, soda, sugar, and cocoa. Beat with a beater until lumps are small but batter is not smooth. Pour onto heated waffle baker and bake. Yield: 2-2/3 cups batter.
